familytree.screen.browser.title: Family Tree - Tracked Pets
familytree.screen.view.title: Family Tree of %s
familytree.screen.empty: No tracked pets yet. Tame and breed a cat, wolf, parrot, or horse to start.
familytree.command.scan.result: Family Tree scan complete: imported %s pets, refreshed %s existing records.
familytree.command.pair.same_parent: Parent A and Parent B must be different pets.
familytree.command.pair.child_matches_pa: The child must be different from both parents.
familytree.command.pair.species_mismatch: Parents and child must all be the same species.
familytree.command.info.help.title: Family Tree tracks your tamed pets, breeding lines, names, ownership, and deaths.
familytree.command.info.help.summary: Use the Family Tree screen to browse pets and lineage, or use commands to manage data directly.
familytree.command.info.help.commands: Commands: /familytree list, /familytree scan, /familytree pair, /familytree unpair, /familytree info <name>.
familytree.command.info.help.scan: /familytree scan imports already-tamed pets that are loaded in the world.
familytree.command.info.help.pair: /familytree pair links two parents to a child record.
familytree.command.info.help.unpair: /familytree unpair clears the parent links from a child record.
